gate.note: Guidance-change validation runs MUST hit dev MCP (serves candidate :main guidance), not prod. The runner defaults to prod — pass --mcp-url explicitly.
gate.grading: judge each model answer vs `gold`/`accept`; gold is operator-verified via own duckdb-geo queries (NOT model consensus).
gate.pass: targeted trap fixed AND no regression vs this baseline (per-question, instance-level).

modes.answer: gold = the computed answer; grade against `accept`.
modes.clarify: gold = recognize the ambiguity and ask; grade on whether the model asks rather than silently picks. Tied to a clarification-steering guidance change.

questions.question: Which countries have the most Ramsar wetland sites?
questions.gold: Top by distinct site: UK 176, Mexico 144, India 94, China 82 …
questions.accept: top country = UK; COUNT(DISTINCT ramsarid), not COUNT(*) (which wrongly puts USA #1)

questions.question: What are the top 10 ecoregions by vulnerable carbon?
questions.gold: West Siberian taiga ~13.85 Gt C #1; taiga+Amazon+Congo top 10 (Mg C, vulnerable-2024)
questions.accept: top ecoregion = West Siberian taiga; values ~±10%; units Mg/Gt C

questions.question: How much and what type of industrial fishing would be displaced by designating all EBSAs in the high seas as MPAs, closed to fishing? Use the most recent year (2024) of Global Fishing Watch effort, reported in apparent fishing hours.
questions.gold: ~1.96M apparent fishing hours (2024) in high-seas EBSAs; ~75% drifting longlines, ~14% squid jigger
questions.accept: ~1.96M hours (2024, now specified), dominated by longlines; high-seas = EBSA∩not-EEZ
questions.note: Original (no year) was ambiguous — answers split 2024 vs multi-year avg. Year now specified; the ambiguous twin is in clarify.txt.

questions.question: How many seamounts are there in the Sargasso Sea "Ecologically or Biologically Significant Marine Area" that was designated on the high seas?
questions.gold: 141 seamounts intersecting Sargasso EBSA (135 fully within)
questions.accept: 135–141 (intersect or within both ok)

questions.question: How many acres of California land are conserved at GAP status 1 or 2?
questions.gold: 26.47M acres GAP1+2 (GAP1 17.73M, GAP2 8.74M)
questions.accept: ~24–28M acres; not the 52M all-units extent

questions.question: Which ecoregion has the most conserved acreage?
questions.gold: Mojave Desert ~7.37M acres #1
questions.accept: top ecoregion = Mojave Desert

questions.question: What percentage of global land is currently inside a designated protected area?
questions.gold: ~16.5% of global land inside WDPA

questions.question: How many people live inside existing protected areas?
questions.gold: ~357M people (GHS-POP 2020)

questions.question: Which ecoregions have the lowest share of their area inside a protected area? List those at approximately 0%.
questions.gold: ~32 ecoregions at ~0% protected; arid/steppe/desert/dry-forest (Horn of Africa, Ordos, Qaidam, Narmada, Chhota-Nagpur …)
questions.accept: names any of the ~0% set or the arid/dry-forest character

questions.question: Show me species richness for mammals and identify the top 5 protected areas by mean richness.
questions.gold: Albertine Rift/Rwenzori + Guianas/W-Amazon top (≥3-cell threshold)
questions.accept: correct hotspot geography; OR graceful 'no mammal-richness layer configured' (catalog gap)

questions.question: Which programs and agencies have funded land conservation in Congressional District 16, and how much?
questions.gold: ~$36.1M CD16: Prop40 $11.75M, Prop12 $7.61M, Property Tax $6.15M, LWCF (USFWS+NPS) ~$5.6M …
questions.accept: programs incl. state bonds + LWCF; total ~$30–40M

questions.question: Which congressional districts have raised the most conservation funding through ballot measures since 2010?
questions.gold: Discriminating skill = SEPARATE statewide props (jurisdiction='State', ~$4.5B baseline touching every CD) from local. Local top is the LA/coastal cluster — full-overlap: CD30/29 ~$665M, CD36/32 ~$527M, CD15 ~$509M; apportioned: CA-11 ~$170M (both defensible).
questions.accept: MUST separate statewide from local measures (the graded skill). Local ranking by EITHER full-overlap OR apportioned attribution accepted; top local districts in the LA/coastal cluster. Do NOT require the full-overlap dollar figures — attribution method is unspecified by the question.
questions.note: Most models self-handled the statewide trap; the 0.5 spread was full-overlap vs apportioned attribution (an unspecified, defensible fork) — an assessment-design issue, not a guidance bug. See findings/tpl-ca-q2-statewide.md.

questions.question: Which CA congressional districts have had failed conservation ballot measures, and how much funding was at stake?
questions.gold: All 52 CDs have failed measures; local-only top CD49 ~$2.15B, CD50 ~$2.13B, CD48 ~$2.12B (San Diego ~$2B driver)
questions.accept: separates statewide ~$7.7B baseline; San Diego-region CDs top local

questions.question: Which Assembly districts have the most protected acreage recorded in the Conservation Almanac?
questions.accept: AD34 top; acres from sites GeoParquet (not SUM on hex)

questions.question: How much has the Land and Water Conservation Fund invested in Senate District 2?
questions.gold: ~$285.5M LWCF in Senate District 2 (BLM-dominated, 48 sites)

questions.question: Compute the land cover composition of areas protected in the Conservation Almanac nationwide, and which states lead in protecting each cover type?
questions.gold: Composition by res-9 cells: herbaceous veg / needleleaf+deciduous forest / agriculture top; state leaders herb→CO, needleleaf→MT, decid→NY, ag→PA, shrubs→CA, wetland→FL
questions.accept: dominant classes ~match + plausible state leaders

questions.question: Which Texas congressional districts recieve the mose federal funding for land conservation? Show on map
questions.accept: CD-34/CD-14 top, ~$29M

questions.question: Which New Jersey municipalities have passed conservation ballot measures, and how does the pattern of successful measures vary across the state?
questions.gold: ~261 NJ municipalities, 444 passed measures (~$1.95B); 1998–2004 wave; north-central concentration
questions.accept: ~261 munis / ~444 passed; 1998–2004 peak; north-central

questions.question: Who has funded land conservation in Boulder County, Colorado? show areas on the map.
questions.gold: Boulder County sales-tax ~$321M dominant; +NRCS ~$6.3M, USFS ~$4.9M, GOCO ~$3.1M
questions.accept: Boulder County local sales-tax dominant + federal/state

questions.question: Calculate vulnerable carbon stored in different wetlands of India?
questions.gold: ~1.1 Pg C (1.1e9 Mg C) total in India wetlands; top classes riverine-forested / rice paddies / temperate peatland
questions.accept: ~0.8–1.4e9 Mg C with by-class breakdown

questions.question: Show Ramsar sites meeting Criterion 9; explain the criterion
questions.gold: 64 Ramsar sites meet Criterion 9; Criterion 9 = supports ≥1% of a population of a wetland-dependent NON-AVIAN animal species
questions.accept: ~60–68 sites AND correct non-avian definition (NOT waterbirds)

questions.question: Rank the top 10 level-3 hydrobasins by wetland extent, carbon, and NCP (min-max normalize each metric to [0,1] across basins, then rank by the equal-weighted mean). Explain methodology.
questions.gold: L3 basin 6030007000 clear #1 (max wetland extent + carbon); top set ~as in gold (rank-sensitive tail)
questions.accept: sound min-max-normalize+composite method; basin 6030007000 #1

questions.question: How much and what type of industrial fishing would be displaced by designating all EBSAs in the high seas as MPAs, closed to fishing?
questions.ambiguity: year unspecified (GFW effort spans 2012–2024; single year vs multi-year average changes the number)
questions.accept: recognizes the year is unspecified and asks which year / whether to average (GFW 2012–2024); does NOT silently pick one and present a single number as definitive
questions.note: Gold = identify the ambiguity and ask; NOT a data answer. Currently fails for most models (they answer anyway) — gated on a clarification-steering guidance change (geo-agent issue).

questions.question: Which congressional district has raised the most conservation funding through ballot measures since 2010?
questions.ambiguity: (1) statewide vs local measures; (2) how to attribute a multi-district measure's funds (full-overlap vs apportioned)
questions.accept: surfaces the statewide-vs-local and/or attribution-method ambiguity and asks how to handle it; does NOT silently pick one attribution and rank
questions.note: Gold = identify the ambiguity and ask; NOT a data answer. Currently fails for most models (they answer anyway) — gated on a clarification-steering guidance change (geo-agent issue).

questions.question: Rank the top 10 level-3 hydrobasins by wetland extent, carbon, and NCP, normalized.
questions.ambiguity: normalization method and weighting unspecified (min-max vs z-score vs rank; equal vs custom weights; NCP is an intensity mixed with extensive sums)
questions.accept: asks how to normalize/weight the composite (and flags the intensity-vs-extensive mismatch) before ranking; does NOT silently choose a method
questions.note: Gold = identify the ambiguity and ask; NOT a data answer. Currently fails for most models (they answer anyway) — gated on a clarification-steering guidance change (geo-agent issue).
